channel.title: Now on Amitav Krishna
channel.description: Recent content in Now on Amitav Krishna

item.title: Now
item.description:
(This is a now page, and if you have your own site, you should make one too.)

(Last updated: 2025-02-13)

  • Right now I’m working on building an LLM from scratch.
  • I’m also trying to use transformers to denoise quantum sensor readings. Heavily inspired by this paper using CNNs to denoise quantum sensor readings and this paper on creating physics-informed networks. Finished the first model with 10,000 circuits, which underperformed the current SOTA, so now I’m scaling it up to a million circuits.
